## Description

<!-- Brief summary of what this PR changes -->

## Type of Change

- [ ] Add new listing(s)
- [ ] Mark role(s) as closed (🔒)
- [ ] Fix broken link(s)
- [ ] Remove expired/duplicate listing
- [ ] Update documentation

## Formatting Checklist

- [ ] Edited `listings.json` directly (not the README table)
- [ ] Ran `python3 .github/scripts/rebuild_readme.py` to regenerate README
- [ ] All required fields are present (`company`, `role`, `location`, `type`, `season`, `education`, `url`, `sponsorship`, `citizenship`, `date_added`)
- [ ] Location uses `City, ST` or `City, Province` format (e.g. `San Jose, CA`)
- [ ] `date_added` is in `YYYY-MM-DD` format
- [ ] Applied 🛂 / 🇺🇸 flags where appropriate via `sponsorship`/`citizenship` fields

## Scope Checklist

- [ ] Role is an electrical engineering internship or co-op (hardware, EE, RF, analog, power, VLSI, ASIC, FPGA, PCB, test, signal processing, photonics, or similar)
- [ ] Position is in the **United States**, **Canada**, or **Remote (US/Canada)**

## Links Checklist

- [ ] Application link goes directly to the job posting (not a generic careers page)
- [ ] Link is publicly accessible without login

## Duplicates & Order

- [ ] Checked that this listing is not already in the repository
- [ ] `listings.json` entries are not manually sorted (the rebuild script handles ordering)
